name: JsBarcode
when_to_use: 需要生成可扫描的 CODE128、EAN、UPC、CODE39、ITF 或 MSI 条形码 SVG 时用它而非手画黑条，因为原生在制式编码、校验位、字符集与静区宽度上失败；非做扫码识别器或标签排版系统。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画视觉近似条纹，做不到各制式的起止码、校验位、模块宽度和合法字符验证，结果不可扫描；JsBarcode 把值与浅 options 直接变成标准 SVG 几何。

data_in.note: value 与 options 直接传给 JsBarcode(svg,value,options)；空 value 由 boot 留成空 SVG，避免 auto format 对空字符串抛错。

schema.value: string —— 待编码值；EAN/UPC 等制式必须满足其位数与校验规则，空字符串为空态

options?._default: {} —— format auto、条宽 2px、条高 100px、显示人读文本
options?.width?: positive number CSS pixels/module —— 默认 2
options?.height?: positive number CSS pixels —— 默认 100
options?.font?: CSS font-family string —— 默认 monospace
options?.fontSize?: positive number CSS pixels —— 默认 20
options?.margin?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认 10
options?.marginTop?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认继承 margin
options?.marginRight?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认继承 margin
options?.marginBottom?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认继承 margin
options?.marginLeft?: non-negative number CSS pixels —— 默认继承 margin

spec.note: 条码 SVG 的实际高由 options.height + 文本与 margin 决定；容器默认至少 140px、禁止 vh/百分比高，若增大 fontSize/margin/options.height 应同步增大 spec.height。

example._why_no_minimal: 值加浅 options 没有深层 config；制式约束已在 schema 钉死，保留空 SVG fixture 即可。

uplink: 纯生成/显示组件，默认无需上行；SVG 序列化、打印或下载由消费 AI 自己实现，不建立平台事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:SVG 直接写入 shadowRoot 子容器，无 CSS/head、canvas、图片、字体 CDN、worker 或 wasm
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG DOM；非默认 webfont 由消费端自行承担字体策略

isolation.evidence: +esm 内无 document.head、无 createElement("style")(styleInject=no);JsBarcode(svg,value,options) 只把几何绘入传入的 SVG 元素,不向 document.body 追加 portal(domMutation=no);无 addEventListener(events=no);SVG 直接写入 shadowRoot 子容器即可(shadow=yes)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to generate scannable CODE128, EAN, UPC, CODE39, ITF, or MSI barcode SVG, instead of drawing black bars by hand, because native implementations fail at symbology encoding, check digits, character sets, and quiet-zone width. Not a barcode scanner or label-layout system.
en.why_valuable: AI can only draw visually similar stripes by default; it cannot implement each symbology's start/stop codes, check digits, module widths, and valid-character checks, so the result is not scannable. JsBarcode turns a value and shallow options directly into standard SVG geometry.

data_in.note: value and options pass directly to JsBarcode(svg,value,options). For an empty value, boot leaves an empty SVG so auto format does not throw on an empty string.

schema.value: string -- Value to encode; EAN/UPC and similar formats must satisfy their length and checksum rules; empty string is the empty state

options?._default: {} -- format auto, bar width 2px, bar height 100px, human-readable text shown
options?.marginTop?: non-negative number CSS pixels -- Inherits margin by default
options?.marginRight?: non-negative number CSS pixels -- Inherits margin by default
options?.marginBottom?: non-negative number CSS pixels -- Inherits margin by default
options?.marginLeft?: non-negative number CSS pixels -- Inherits margin by default

spec.note: Actual barcode SVG height is determined by options.height plus text and margin. The container defaults to at least 140px and prohibits vh/percentage height. If fontSize/margin/options.height increases, increase spec.height as well.
